label: CYPHES Genesis Guardian Target Index
policy: Public DeFi coverage only. CYPHES does not submit external reports in auto mode. Human approval is required before any external disclosure, escalation, payout claim, or protocol contact.

targets.scopeText:
Focused path: contracts/UniswapV2ERC20.sol
Public DeFi guardian coverage for ERC20 permit, approval, balance, domain separator, and signature assumptions.
No repository writes, no code execution, no production interaction.
targets.auditBrief: Genesis guardian quest. Review the pinned Uniswap V2 ERC20 implementation for evidence-backed correctness, signature-domain assumptions, non-reportable leads, and residual uncertainty. Do not submit externally.

targets.auditBrief: Genesis guardian quest. Review the pinned Uniswap V2 pair contract for exploit-class coverage and evidence-backed negative findings. Do not submit externally.
